name: narrator: per-turn delta contains playbook preference block

source.purpose: Verifies that buildMessagesForNarrator injects the playbook preference soft directive into the per-turn delta when the PC has proficiencies. Closes Stage 4 of the playbook-fit work — Narrator-side P2 backstop. Companion to the Author-side P1 fix (pcCapabilities in seed + Author rule 22).

input.playerInput: Press the elder for the truth.
